title: Leetcode 1381. Design a Stack With Increment Operation
shortDescription: Implement a bounded stack (maxSize) supporting push, pop (returning -1 if empty), and increment(k, val) which adds val to the bottom k elements; the core challenge is applying these bottom-k increments efficiently (avoiding O(k) per increment) using lazy/differential bookkeeping so operations are O(1).

Leetcode 1381. Design a Stack With Increment Operation

Implement a bounded stack (maxSize) supporting push, pop (returning -1 if empty), and increment(k, val) which adds val to the bottom k elements; the core challenge is applying these bottom-k increments efficiently (avoiding O(k) per increment) using lazy/differential bookkeeping so operations are O(1).

Asked at:

Google
